query:
-- For each duplicate group, update the row with the highest dialsTotal (VOIP row)
-- with the ARR and demos from the Pipedrive row, then delete the other row.
-- Strategy: keep the row with MAX(dialsTotal), update it with MAX(arrUsd) and MAX(demosTotal)

-- Step 1: Update the keeper row (max dialsTotal) with best ARR and demos values
UPDATE monthly_metrics m1
JOIN (
  SELECT aeId, year, month,
    MAX(id) as keep_id,
    MAX(dialsTotal) as best_dials,
    MAX(connectedDials) as best_connected,
    MAX(CAST(arrUsd AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as best_arr,
    MAX(demosTotal) as best_demos,
    MAX(demosFromPipedrive) as best_demos_pd
  FROM monthly_metrics
  GROUP BY aeId, year, month
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) best ON m1.id = best.keep_id
SET 
  m1.dialsTotal = best.best_dials,
  m1.connectedDials = best.best_connected,
  m1.arrUsd = best.best_arr,
  m1.demosTotal = best.best_demos,
  m1.demosFromPipedrive = best.best_demos_pd;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute

-- with the ARR and demos from the Pipedrive row, then delete the other row.
-- Strategy: keep the row with MAX(dialsTotal), update it with MAX(arrUsd) and MAX(demosTotal)

-- Step 1: Update the keeper row (max dialsTotal) with best ARR and demos values
UPDATE monthly_metrics m1
JOIN (
  SELECT aeId, year, month,
    MAX(id) as keep_id,
    MAX(dialsTotal) as best_dials,
    MAX(connectedDials) as best_connected,
    MAX(CAST(arrUsd AS DECIMAL(12,2))) as best_arr,
    MAX(demosTotal) as best_demos,
    MAX(demosFromPipedrive) as best_demos_pd
  FROM monthly_metrics
  GROUP BY aeId, year, month
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) best ON m1.id = best.keep_id
SET 
  m1.dialsTotal = best.best_dials,
  m1.connectedDials = best.best_connected,
  m1.arrUsd = best.best_arr,
  m1.demosTotal = best.best_demos,
  m1.demosFromPipedrive = best.best_demos_pd;
